description: Shared allowlist for hardening scripts. Every entry MUST have a reason and an expiry date. Expired entries re-trigger CI failure.

audit._comment: Advisory IDs that may be temporarily allowlisted (high-severity only; critical is NEVER allowlistable)

secrets._comment: Paths or patterns that are false positives for secrets detection

entries.reason: Example env file contains placeholder values, not real secrets
Example env file contains placeholder values, not real secrets
Example env file contains placeholder values, not real secrets

licenses._comment: Package names that are exceptions to the disallowed license list
